objectives.description: Find a way out of the cryo bay.
Explore the ship. Learn what happened to the crew.
Find the synthesis protocol in Dr. Lin's office and make the cure.

memory_fragments.memory_cryo_decision: Walking to Pod 23. Looking back. 'I am sorry.'
memory_fragments.memory_fathers_beach: Your father on the beach, teaching you the stars.
memory_fragments.memory_mothers_goodbye: Your mother at the launch facility. 'Come home to me, Alex.'
